name: profile: profiles/node.yaml resolves to a rule set including every g-node-001..010
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/resolve.sh" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/node.yaml" --emit-resolved 2>out.json && for i in 001 002 003 004 005 006 007 008 009 010; do grep -E "g-node-$i" out.json >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL g-node-$i not in node profile" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
